ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lpi_scores" (
  "lpi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each LPI score entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the LPI score */,
  "overall_score" REAL /* Overall LPI score */,
  "overall_rank" INTEGER /* Overall LPI rank */,
  "survey_respondents" INTEGER /* Number of survey respondents */,
  "survey_responses" INTEGER /* Number of survey responses */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lpi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lpi_scores_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customs" (
  "customs_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customs score entry */,
  "lpi_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the LPI score entry */,
  "score" REAL /* Customs efficiency score */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Customs efficiency rank */,
  "customs_procedures" INTEGER /* Number of customs procedures */,
  "customs_clearance_time" REAL /* Average customs clearance time in hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customs_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customs_lpi_id FOREIGN KEY ("lpi_id") REFERENCES lpi_scores ("lpi_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "infrastructure" (
  "infrastructure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each infrastructure score entry */,
  "lpi_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the LPI score entry */,
  "score" REAL /* Infrastructure quality score */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Infrastructure quality rank */,
  "road_quality" REAL /* Road quality score */,
  "port_quality" REAL /* Port quality score */,
  "airport_quality" REAL /* Airport quality score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("infrastructure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_infrastructure_lpi_id FOREIGN KEY ("lpi_id") REFERENCES lpi_scores ("lpi_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "international_shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each international shipment score entry */,
  "lpi_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the LPI score entry */,
  "score" REAL /* International shipments score */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* International shipments rank */,
  "export_volume" REAL /* Export volume in thousands of tons */,
  "import_volume" REAL /* Import volume in thousands of tons */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_international_shipments_lpi_id FOREIGN KEY ("lpi_id") REFERENCES lpi_scores ("lpi_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logistics_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each logistics quality score entry */,
  "lpi_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the LPI score entry */,
  "score" REAL /* Logistics quality and competence score */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Logistics quality and competence rank */,
  "logistics_competence" REAL /* Logistics competence score */,
  "logistics_qualifications" REAL /* Logistics qualifications score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logistics_quality_lpi_id FOREIGN KEY ("lpi_id") REFERENCES lpi_scores ("lpi_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracking_tracing" (
  "tracking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tracking and tracing score entry */,
  "lpi_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the LPI score entry */,
  "score" REAL /* Tracking and tracing score */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Tracking and tracing rank */,
  "tracking_frequency" REAL /* Tracking frequency score */,
  "tracing_accuracy" REAL /* Tracing accuracy score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tracking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracking_tracing_lpi_id FOREIGN KEY ("lpi_id") REFERENCES lpi_scores ("lpi_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timeliness" (
  "timeliness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each timeliness score entry */,
  "lpi_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the LPI score entry */,
  "score" REAL /* Timeliness score */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Timeliness rank */,
  "schedule_reliability" REAL /* Schedule reliability score */,
  "shipping_reliability" REAL /* Shipping reliability score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timeliness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timeliness_lpi_id FOREIGN KEY ("lpi_id") REFERENCES lpi_scores ("lpi_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "lpi_id" INTEGER /* ID of the LPI score entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the LPI data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the LPI data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "query_parameters" TEXT /* Query parameters used to filter the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_lpi_id FOREIGN KEY ("lpi_id") REFERENCES lpi_scores ("lpi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the external data */,
  "economic_indicator" REAL /* Economic indicator (e.g., GDP growth rate) */,
  "political_stability" REAL /* Political stability index */,
  "transportation_cost" REAL /* Average transportation cost */,
  "infrastructure_investment" REAL /* Infrastructure investment in millions of USD */,
  "trade_volume" REAL /* Trade volume in billions of USD */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_external_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the country group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the country group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_group_memberships" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country group membership */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country group */,
  "membership_year" INTEGER /* Year of membership */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_group_memberships_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES country_groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_group_memberships_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)
